description_long: This stereo sound system features a sleek, rectangular body with a matte black finish and sharp, angular edges. The front face is dominated by a wide, flat panel with subtle branding on the lower corners, and a central area that likely houses the main speaker grille. The top surface is smooth, with a slightly recessed section that may contain a touch-sensitive control panel or display. Both sides of the unit have angled, vent-like panels, suggesting integrated speaker outputs or cooling vents. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible knobs or protruding buttons, emphasizing a streamlined aesthetic suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern, matte black stereo sound system with a wide, flat front panel and angular, vented sides. Its sleek, minimal design features subtle branding and a smooth top surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat face with branding on the lower corners and a central speaker area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular, vented panel and the sloped top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back panel, which is mostly flat and unadorned, emphasizing the unit's depth.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angled vent and the smooth, sloped top.
attribute_brand_logo: Small rectangular logo on the lower left front corner with unreadable text; another small marking on the lower right front corner.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Fine mesh or perforated grille pattern on the front panel, extending across the central area; side panels also appear vented with a mesh-like texture.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A touch-sensitive or button control panel is likely present on the top surface, slightly recessed, with no visible knobs or sliders.
